robots.name: Bloch Sphere
robots.description: Interactive 3D qubit visualization — drag to rotate, apply X/Y/Z/H/S/T gates, see state vector in real time.

robots.name: Quantum Gates
robots.description: Learn all quantum gates — interactive matrix visualization, before/after state, truth tables for each gate.

robots.name: Entanglement
robots.description: Create Bell pairs, measure one qubit, watch the other collapse instantly. Run 1000 experiments, see the statistics.

robots.name: Quantum Teleportation
robots.description: Step-by-step teleportation protocol — Alice prepares, entangles, measures. Bob corrects. See the state transfer.

robots.name: Grover's Search
robots.description: Quantum search algorithm — watch amplitude amplification find the needle in the haystack. Compare with classical search.

robots.name: Qubit Simulator
robots.description: Full state-vector simulator for 1-6 qubits. Build circuits, measure, see probability distributions as bar charts.

robots.name: Circuit Builder
robots.description: Drag-and-drop quantum circuit editor. Wire qubits, add gates, simulate step by step. Export to Qiskit/Cirq code.
